'''razhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrantally|quadrantally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-zh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrantally|quadrantally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| razhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:razhate|razhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:razhatesher|razhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razhatesherĂ«m|razhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:razhatero|razhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:razhateshĂ«|razhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razhateshĂ«m|razhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirazhatero|gokirazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirazhateshĂ«|gokirazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirazhateshĂ«m|gokirazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorazhankerom|gorazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorazhankeshĂ«|gorazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorazhankeshĂ«m|gorazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorazhankeya|gorazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:razhaterom|razhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razhatemu|razhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:razhateya|razhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirazhaterom|gokirazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirazhatemu|gokirazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirazhateya|gokirazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:razhazhate|razhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:razhazhatesher|razhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razhazhatesherĂ«m|razhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:razhazhatero|razhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:razhazhateshĂ«|razhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razhazhateshĂ«m|razhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirazhazhatero|gokirazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirazhazhateshĂ«|gokirazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirazhazhateshĂ«m|gokirazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorazhazhankerom|gorazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorazhazhankeshĂ«|gorazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorazhazhankeshĂ«m|gorazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorazhazhankeya|gorazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:razhazhaterom|razhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razhazhatemu|razhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:razhazhateya|razhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirazhazhaterom|gokirazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirazhazhatemu|gokirazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirazhazhateya|gokirazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠzhĂŠte|rĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠzhĂŠtesher|rĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠzhĂŠtero|rĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokirĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠzhĂŠterom|rĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠzhĂŠtemu|rĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠzhĂŠteya|rĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokirĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokirĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafzhafte|rafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafzhaftesher|rafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafzhaftesherĂ«m|rafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafzhaftero|rafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafzhafteshĂ«|rafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafzhafteshĂ«m|rafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafzhaftero|gokirafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafzhafteshĂ«|gokirafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafzhafteshĂ«m|gokirafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafzhafnkerom|gorafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafzhafnkeshĂ«|gorafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafzhafnkeshĂ«m|gorafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafzhafnkeya|gorafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafzhafterom|rafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafzhaftemu|rafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafzhafteya|rafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafzhafterom|gokirafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafzhaftemu|gokirafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafzhafteya|gokirafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
